Nodes.Name: SendBulk
Nodes.MainScript:
import json, urllib.request
raw = """${body}"""
try:
    data = json.loads(raw) if raw and raw.strip() else {}
except Exception:
    data = {}
subject = data.get("subject") or ""
bodytext = data.get("body") or ""
owner = data.get("ownerUserId") or ""
recipients = data.get("recipients") or []
if not isinstance(recipients, list):
    recipients = []
from_email = "${SENDGRID_FROM_EMAIL}"
api_key = "${SENDGRID_API_KEY}"
def s(v):
    if v is None or v=="": return "NULL"
    return "'"+str(v).replace("'","''")+"'"
def iv(v):
    try:
        if v in (None,""): return "NULL"
        return str(int(v))
    except Exception: return "NULL"
sent=0
failed=0
stmts=[]
for r in recipients[:500]:
    if not isinstance(r, dict): continue
    to = r.get("email") or ""
    if not to: continue
    lead_id = r.get("leadId")
    name = r.get("name") or ""
    subj = subject.replace("{{name}}", name)
    bod = bodytext.replace("{{name}}", name)
    status="queued"
    msg_id=""
    payload={"personalizations":[{"to":[{"email":to}]}],"from":{"email":from_email},"subject":subj,"content":[{"type":"text/plain","value":bod}]}
    try:
        req=urllib.request.Request("https://api.sendgrid.com/v3/mail/send", data=json.dumps(payload).encode("utf-8"), headers={"Authorization":"Bearer "+api_key,"Content-Type":"application/json"}, method="POST")
        resp=urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=20)
        msg_id=resp.headers.get("X-Message-Id","") or ""
        status="sent"
        sent+=1
    except Exception as e:
        status="failed"
        failed+=1
    stmts.append("INSERT INTO emails (LeadId, Direction, FromEmail, ToEmail, Subject, Body, Status, ProviderMessageId, OwnerUserId, SentAt) VALUES ("+iv(lead_id)+", 'outbound', "+s(from_email)+", "+s(to)+", "+s(subj)+", "+s(bod)+", "+s(status)+", "+s(msg_id)+", "+s(owner)+", CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);")
    if lead_id not in (None,""):
        stmts.append("INSERT INTO activities (LeadId, Type, Subject, Body, OwnerUserId) VALUES ("+iv(lead_id)+", 'email', "+s("Campaign: "+subj)+", "+s(bod)+", "+s(owner)+");")
        stmts.append("UPDATE leads SET LastContactedAt=CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, UpdatedAt=CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE Id = "+iv(lead_id)+";")
if not stmts:
    return "SELECT 0 AS Sent, 0 AS Failed;"
return " ".join(stmts) + " SELECT "+str(sent)+" AS Sent, "+str(failed)+" AS Failed;"

Nodes.Name: CrmDb
Nodes.MainScript: ${SendBulk}

Nodes.Name: InboundLog
Nodes.MainScript:
import json, re
sender = """${from}"""
subject = """${subject}"""
text = """${text}"""
if sender.strip().startswith("${"):
    sender = ""
if subject.strip().startswith("${"):
    subject = ""
if text.strip().startswith("${"):
    text = ""
m = re.search(r"[A-Za-z0-9._%+-]+@[A-Za-z0-9.-]+\.[A-Za-z]{2,}", sender or "")
email = m.group(0) if m else (sender or "")
def s(v):
    if v is None or v=="": return "NULL"
    return "'"+str(v).replace("'","''")+"'"
sql = ""
sql += "INSERT INTO emails (LeadId, Direction, FromEmail, Subject, Body, Status, RepliedAt) SELECT Id, 'inbound', "+s(email)+", "+s(subject)+", "+s(text)+", 'replied', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP FROM leads WHERE Email = "+s(email)+" LIMIT 1; "
sql += "UPDATE emails SET Status='replied', RepliedAt=CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE Direction='outbound' AND ToEmail = "+s(email)+" AND RepliedAt IS NULL; "
sql += "UPDATE leads SET LastContactedAt=CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, UpdatedAt=CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE Email = "+s(email)+"; "
sql += "INSERT INTO activities (LeadId, Type, Subject, Body) SELECT Id, 'email', "+s("Reply received")+", "+s(text)+" FROM leads WHERE Email = "+s(email)+" LIMIT 1; "
sql += "SELECT 'ok' AS status;"
return sql
